#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "AI Günlük Burç & Fal Uygulaması - Türkçe AI destekli kişiselleştirilmiş günlük burç/fal yorumu üreten mobil uygulama"

backend:
  - task: "Health check endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "GET /api/health endpoint working correctly"

  - task: "User registration endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST /api/users/register creates new user or returns existing"

  - task: "AI Reading generation endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST /api/readings/generate uses OpenAI GPT-4o to generate Turkish horoscope readings"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: AI generation working perfectly. Generated high-quality Turkish content for multiple focus areas (relationships, work_money) and zodiac signs. All required fields present. Content includes proper Turkish characters and motivational/realistic tones work correctly."

  - task: "Expand reading endpoint (for ads)"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST /api/readings/expand needs testing"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Reading expansion working perfectly. Successfully expands basic readings with detailed Turkish content (791 chars detailed analysis). Properly updates is_expanded flag and generates comprehensive horoscope analysis with emojis and structured format."

  - task: "Daily reading check endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "GET /api/readings/check-daily/{device_id} needs testing"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Daily reading limit check working perfectly. Correctly returns has_free_reading status and readings_used count. Daily reset functionality works properly for new users."

  - task: "Reading history endpoint"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "GET /api/readings/history/{device_id} needs testing"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Reading history endpoint working perfectly. Returns proper array of readings with all required fields (id, daily_energy, focus_comment, created_at). Handles both empty and populated histories correctly with proper JSON structure."

frontend:
  - task: "Welcome/Landing screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Landing screen with dark mystical theme working"

  - task: "Focus selection screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/focus.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "4 focus options (relationships, work_money, decisions, general) working"

  - task: "Tone selection screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/tone.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "2 tone options (realistic, motivational) working"

  - task: "Zodiac selection screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/zodiac.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "12 zodiac signs with skip option working"

  - task: "Result/Reading display screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/result.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows AI-generated reading with 4 sections, ad modal working"

  - task: "History screen"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/history.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "low"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows past readings or empty state"

metadata:
  created_by: "main_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus: []
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "main"
    message: "MVP implementation complete. Backend uses OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key for Turkish horoscope generation. Frontend has complete user flow with ad simulation. Please test all backend endpoints."
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "✅ BACKEND TESTING COMPLETE: All 8 API endpoints tested successfully. AI generation working perfectly with Turkish content, daily limits functional, reading expansion working, history and today endpoints operational. No critical issues found. All endpoints return proper JSON responses with Turkish horoscope content."
